_comment: Pill Demon — Renegade Immortal. A sentient pill that gained awareness after absorbing too much spiritual energy. Canon: appears near alchemy labs and pill refining sites.
name: Pill Demon

canonical.appearance: A small, glowing orb of condensed pill energy — 0.3-0.5m diameter. Shifts color based on its dominant attribute. Can grow limbs temporarily for locomotion and combat.
canonical.behavior: Mischievous rather than hostile. Steals alchemy ingredients. Can enhance or ruin pills being refined nearby. Flees from strong cultivators but taunts weak ones.
canonical.habitat: Alchemy labs, pill refining sites, herb gardens
canonical.cultivation: Qi Condensation equivalent (varies with absorbed energy)
canonical.intelligence: 6-8 (fully sentient, can speak, has personality — usually eccentric and greedy)
canonical.diet: Absorbs raw alchemy ingredients and spiritual herbs
canonical.relationships: Sometimes kept as a pet/lab assistant by alchemy masters. Wild pill demons are considered pests by sect alchemists.
techniques: Pill absorption (consumes nearby item drops for healing)
Alchemy sabotage (corrupts active furnaces within 10 blocks)
Pill burst (AoE healing or damage based on absorbed element)
treasures: Pill Demon Essence (rare alchemy catalyst — doubles pill quality)
mutations: Elemental Absorption — gains resistance to the last element it consumed
canonical.ecology: Scavenger and opportunist. Not a predator — survives by stealing alchemy materials. Common near sect alchemy halls.

art_direction.model_notes: Small glowing orb with particle effects. Transient limbs. Color-shifting based on absorbed element.
art_direction.texture_notes: Glowing sphere with swirling inner patterns. Bright green by default. Trails sparkle particles.
